item.title: 3 Major Buybacks Just Dropped—Here’s the Signal Investors See
item.description: Walmart, Lyft, and Equitable announced new buybacks. See authorization sizes, what they mean for share count and EPS, plus where analysts see upside.

item.title: 3 of the Most Highly Anticipated IPOs of 2026
item.description: As OpenAI and SpaceX position to go public, the most anticipated IPOs of 2026 could end up belonging to Anthropic, Discord, and Plaid.

item.title: 3 Big Dividend Stocks Just Raised Payouts—Here’s Who’s Leading in 2026
item.description: Dividends are moving up for three mid-to-high yield stocks that are big-time players in their respective industries. Their yields sit between 2.5% and...

item.title: The Supply Chain Quietly Powering the AI Boom—And 4 Ways to Play It
